title: OSP Profile: Consulting v1
description: Vocabulary for professional advisory and consulting services: strategy, operations, transformation, technology. Captures the dimensions on which buyers actually differentiate firms — practice area, industry depth, methodology, implementation capability — rather than generic service attributes.

practice_areas.description: Practice areas the firm actively serves. Agents should match on this list before ranking on any other criterion.

engagement_models.description: How the firm engages. Pure advisory differs fundamentally from implementation-led work.

industry_expertise.description: Industries where the firm has demonstrable depth. Self-declared; consumers weigh against references.

items.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code, or region group. Example: 'DE', 'US', 'SG', 'APAC', 'LATAM'.

target_market_expertise.description: Geographic markets the firm knows first-hand (as opposed to merely serving from HQ).

client_size_focus.description: Client segments the firm is structured to serve. Revenue bands vary by geography; this enum captures the structural fit rather than a currency amount.

team_composition.description: Indicative staffing. Distinguishes boutique partner-led shops from pyramid firms.

methodology_style.description: Analytical approaches the firm employs. Clients with data-heavy problems filter out design-thinking-only shops and vice versa.

proprietary_benchmarks_available.description: Whether the firm maintains proprietary benchmark datasets that inform its work. Significant differentiator for strategy and operations work.

implementation_capability.description: Whether the firm can execute the strategies it recommends, beyond advisory handover. Often the decisive question for transformation programmes.

deliverable_types.description: Typical outputs produced. Grounds expectations on artefacts.

languages_of_work.description: Working languages (writing, workshops, interviews). Not marketing languages.

references_sharable.description: Whether anonymised or named client references can be provided during evaluation. Many mandates are confidential; declaring this honestly saves time.

conflict_of_interest_policy.description: How concurrent engagements with competitors are managed.
